diagrams.title: Rank-Nullity Theorem Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows the decomposition of domain V into null space and its complement
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how input space splits into mapped-to-zero and mapped-to-nonzero parts

diagrams.title: Four Fundamental Subspaces
diagrams.description: Two separate vector spaces showing the four subspaces of matrix A
elements: Left: ℝⁿ with Row space (top) and Null space (bottom), perpendicular
Right: ℝᵐ with Column space (top) and Left null space (bottom), perpendicular
Dimensions labeled: rank, n-rank, rank, m-rank
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complete structure of linear transformations and orthogonal complements

diagrams.title: Linear Transformation Mapping
diagrams.description: Shows T: V → W and how vectors map, illustrating kernel and image
elements: Mapping arrows showing T maps kernel to origin
Vectors outside kernel map to distinct nonzero points in image
diagrams.purpose: Visualize one-to-one and onto properties through kernel and image
